<!-- Thanks for contributing to AgentTune! Keep it tight. -->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two lines: what did you add or sharpen, and for which type? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New **Soul** (`souls/<handle>.md`)
- [ ] Edit to an existing tuning
- [ ] New personality **system** (open an issue first — link it here)
- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, formatting)

## Checklist

- [ ] I identify as this type — or know someone who does — and the rules reflect real experience.
- [ ] Follows the schema and voice in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (imperative; what the agent *does*, not what the user *is*).
- [ ] Within the word-count target (tunings 200–400 · souls 300–1500).
- [ ] No private data or PII beyond a display name.

<!-- PR title format:  [mbti] tighten INFP wording  ·  [soul] add @handle  ·  [enneagram] add Type 5 -->
